steps.title: Match quotation to purpose
steps.content: The student needs a quotation from Boateng explaining why pointillism fits Exquisite. The relevant quoted idea is that extending dabs of color can create an "illusion of movement," which connects directly to five dancing women twirling their skirts.

steps.title: Reject weaker note uses
steps.content: B defines pointillism without quoting Boateng. C quotes how the technique works but does not connect it to the painting's movement. D quotes her view of Ghanaian women, not her reason for using pointillism. The answer is A.
